units.content: system includes a vocabulary store holding an operational-mechanism vocabulary with language-independent numerical identifiers
each identifier carries a Boolean admissibility flag with two possible values
first flag value indicates identifier names a physical or computational mechanism embodied by a measurement instrument
second flag value indicates identifier names a theoretical commitment about reality or an assumption about a measurement target
vocabulary store rejects at insertion time any identifier whose admissibility flag takes the second value
any consumer of the vocabulary store is constrained to read only identifiers whose flag takes the first value
storage holds a plurality of inference steps each comprising a claim descriptor, a convergence-status annotation, and a list of admissible operational-mechanism identifiers
convergence-status annotation is drawn from at least the values converged, tension, and divergent
list of identifiers in each inference step is drawn from the vocabulary store
inference-step consumer processes the plurality of inference steps under a reading discipline that excludes identifiers with second-value flags
vocabulary store enforces admissibility via schema-level validation making inadmissible identifiers architecturally incapable of entering the reading path
any inference drawn by the consumer from shared identifiers across distinct inference steps reflects shared instrument mechanism and not shared theoretical framing
